12: :root{--bg:#080b14;--s:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);--fg:#fff;--m:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);--a:#24d178;--b:#4a8cff;--bo:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);--r:14px;--fs:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Inter","Segoe UI",system-ui,sans-serif;--fm:"JetBrains Mono","IBM Plex Mono",ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace}
13: *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
14: html,body{width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:var(--bg);font-family:var(--fs);-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;color:var(--fg)}
15: #app{width:100vw;height:100vh;position:relative}
16: .stage{width:100%;height:100%;position:relative}
17: .sl{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:0;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none}
18: .sl.act{opacity:1;visibility:visible;pointer-events:auto}
19: .ag{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.018) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.018) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:40px 40px;pointer-events:none;z-index:0}
20: .in{position:relative;z-index:1;width:100%;max-width:960px;padding:32px 40px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;text-align:center}
21: .lb{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--m);margin-bottom:24px;opacity:0.6}
22: .s0 .ch{display:inline-block;padding:6px 18px;border:1px solid rgba(36,209,120,0.2);border-radius:999px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;background:rgba(36,209,120,0.06);color:var(--a);margin-bottom:16px}
23: .s0 .tt{font-size:clamp(48px,8vw,110px);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-0.04em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff 40%,rgba(255,255,255,0.5));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;line-height:1.05}
24: .s0 .su{font-size:clamp(16px,2vw,24px);font-weight:400;color:var(--m);margin-top:12px}
25: .pt{position:absolute;width:3px;height:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none}
26: @keyframes fl{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}25%{transform:translateY(-18px) scale(1.15)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px) scale(0.9)}75%{transform:translateY(-22px) scale(1.05)}}
27: .s1 .g{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;width:100%;max-width:860px}
28: .s1 .c{padding:28px 20px;background:var(--s);border:1px solid var(--bo);border-radius:var(--r);text-align:left;backdrop-filter:blur(12px)}
29: .s1 .ci{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:16px;margin-bottom:12px}
30: .s1 .ci.r{background:rgba(239,68,68,0.12);color:#ef4444}
31: .s1 .ci.y{background:rgba(251,191,36,0.12);color:#fbbf24}
32: .s1 .ci.p{background:rgba(168,85,247,0.12);color:#a855f7}
33: .s1 .c h3{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-0.01em;margin-bottom:4px}
34: .s1 .c p{font-size:12px;color:var(--m);line-height:1.5}
35: .s2 .sp{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto 1fr;width:100%;max-width:860px;align-items:center}
36: .s2 .sd{padding:24px 20px;border-radius:var(--r);text-align:left}
37: .s2 .sd.b{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);border:1px solid var(--bo)}
38: .s2 .sd.a{background:rgba(36,209,120,0.05)
